data.title: Shiftie: Staff Scheduling & Team Management Simplified
data.excerpt: Discover Shiftie, the intuitive staff scheduling software that builds rotas in minutes, manages availability, and tracks time easily. Start your free trial!

$media.alt: Shiftie: Staff Scheduling & Team Management Simplified

children.text: Disclosure: This article contains affiliate links, which means I may earn a commission if you make a purchase through them at no extra cost to you.

If you've ever felt the headache of juggling spreadsheets, sticky notes, and endless text chains just to figure out who is working when, you're not alone. For many managers and business owners, staff scheduling is a necessary but time-consuming evil. It's the kind of admin that eats into hours you could spend on growth, strategy, or actually talking to your team. That's where modern tools step in, and today, I'm genuinely excited to talk about one that cuts through the clutter: Shiftie.
What Exactly Is Shiftie?

At its heart, Shiftie is dedicated online software built specifically for one thing: to make creating and managing staff rotas (or schedules) incredibly simple. It's not a bloated, all-in-one HR platform trying to do a thousand things. Instead, it focuses on the core pain points of shift-based team management. Think of it as your digital command center for everything related to "who's working, where, and when."

From a single dashboard, you can build rotas, track employee availability, manage leave requests, automate timesheets, and even communicate with your team. The goal is to take what used to be a multi-step, often chaotic process and turn it into something you can handle in a fraction of the time. For businesses in retail, hospitality, healthcare, events, or any sector with a rotating workforce, this kind of focus is a game-changer.
A Closer Look at Shiftie's Core Features
Where Shiftie truly shines is in how its features work together seamlessly. Let's break down the key pillars that make it so effective.
Intelligent Rota Building

Gone are the days of starting from a blank spreadsheet. Shiftie lets you build rotas in minutes, not hours. You can drag and drop shifts, copy schedules from previous weeks, and easily assign employees based on their roles and availability. The software even helps optimize your schedule to reduce conflicts and ensure you're never over- or under-staffed.
See how this streamlined approach can transform your workflow
Availability & Leave Management

One of the biggest scheduling headaches is tracking who can and cannot work. Shiftie puts this responsibility partly on your team in a good way. Employees can log into the portal to set their availability, pick up open shifts, and request time off. Managers get a clear, consolidated view, making approvals and adjustments a breeze. This two-way street drastically cuts down on miscommunication.
Time Clock & Automated Timesheets

Accuracy in payroll is non-negotiable. Shiftie includes a simple time clock feature that allows employees to clock in and out via a mobile app or kiosk. All that data feeds directly into the system to generate accurate timesheets. This automates a huge chunk of payroll prep, eliminates manual timesheet chasing, and reduces errors. It’s a feature that pays for itself in saved administrative hours.
Multi-Venue & Team Messaging

For businesses with multiple locations, Shiftie’s multi-venue support is a standout. You can manage and view rotas for different sites all from one account. Coupled with built-in team messaging, you can communicate shift changes, send announcements, or message individuals directly, keeping everyone in the loop without relying on disparate apps.
Discover more about these powerful use cases here
Who Is Shiftie Perfect For?
Shiftie isn't trying to be everything to everyone, and that's its strength. It's ideal for:
Small to Medium-Sized Businesses (SMBs):
Especially those in retail, cafes, restaurants, hotels, and gyms where shift work is the norm.
Event Management Companies:
Handling temporary staff for different events and venues becomes manageable.
Healthcare Clinics & Practices:
Scheduling nurses, technicians, and support staff across varying shifts.
Multi-Location Franchises:
Owners or managers who need a unified view across several branches.
Busy Managers & Owners:
Anyone who currently spends more than 30 minutes a week building schedules and wants that time back. If you're comparing options, understanding
why to choose Shiftie
over more complex systems can be very helpful.
New & Highlighted Features You'll Love
The team behind Shiftie constantly refines the platform based on real user feedback. Some standout features that highlight this commitment include:
Customizable Reports:
Move beyond basic schedules. Generate reports on labor costs, attendance patterns, and shift distribution to make smarter business decisions.
Document Storage:
Keep employee documents like contracts and certifications securely stored within the platform, easily accessible during scheduling or HR reviews.
Enhanced Mobile Experience:
The mobile app for employees is continuously improved, making it easier than ever for your team to manage their schedules on the go.
Stay updated on all the latest enhancements
Pricing That Makes Sense
Shiftie believes in transparency and accessibility. That's why they offer a straightforward pricing model starting at just
£2.75 per employee per month
. All plans come with a full-featured
28-day free trial

—no credit card required. There are no hidden fees for core features like scheduling, availability, time tracking, and support. They even offer custom pricing for larger teams, so you only pay for what you need.
Get started and try Shiftie for free with their no-obligation trial
Getting Started is a Breeze

What immediately strikes you about Shiftie is its low barrier to entry. The sign-up process is quick, and the interface is clean and intuitive. You don't need a dedicated IT person to set it up. Most managers can import their team and build their first rota within the first session. The support team, available 7 days a week, is renowned for being helpful and UK-based, which is a huge plus if you ever get stuck.

If you're coming from a manual system, the time saved in the first month alone is often staggering. One manager I know saved over 5 hours a week—that's 260 hours a year—reclaiming that time for customer service and team development. The shift from reactive scheduling chaos to proactive management is palpable.
Ready to see the difference for yourself?
Start your free 28-day Shiftie trial and build your first rota in minutes
. You have nothing to lose and a whole lot of admin time to gain.

children.text: What is Shiftie exactly?

Shiftie is a cloud-based staff scheduling and team management software. It focuses specifically on creating employee rotas (schedules), managing availability and leave, automating timesheets through a time clock, and facilitating team communication. It's designed to replace messy spreadsheets and streamline the core admin of running a shift-based team.
How much does Shiftie cost?

Shiftie uses simple, transparent pricing starting at £2.75 per employee per month. Every plan includes all features and a 28-day free trial with no credit card required. Custom pricing is available for larger organizations. There are no hidden fees for support or core functionality.
Is Shiftie suitable for a small coffee shop or retail store?

Absolutely. Shiftie is built for small to medium businesses just like yours. Its intuitive design means you don't need technical expertise to set it up. Features like drag-and-drop scheduling, mobile availability management for staff, and automated timesheets directly address the daily challenges faced by managers in cafes, shops, and restaurants.
